title: The Goblin Cave
description: A young boy must clear the goblin-infested cave to save his village.

story.intro: You are a young boy living in a quiet village at the edge of the Whispering Woods. Lately, goblins have been raiding from a cave deep in the forest. Elder Thom has asked for your help.
story.outro: With the Goblin Chief defeated, the cave falls silent. You return to the village a hero. But something stirs in the distance... a new chapter awaits.
